title: comesperma virgatum var. corniculatum
intro: Comesperma virgatum var. corniculatum, commonly known as the 'Waxy Pea', is a variety of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Comesperma virgatum var. corniculatum include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
